Thank you for taking the time to work on a Pull Request for this project!

> **Note**: This PR will be automatically validated. Please make sure all checks pass before requesting review.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Adding a new API entry
- [ ] Fixing a broken link
- [ ] Updating an existing entry
- [ ] Documentation / formatting fix
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry format: `| [Name](URL) | Description | Auth | HTTPS | CORS |`
- [ ] Auth value is one of: `No`, `apiKey`, `OAuth`, `X-Mashape-Key`
- [ ] HTTPS value is `Yes` or `No`
- [ ] CORS value is `Yes`, `No`, or `Unknown`
- [ ] Description does **not** end with punctuation
- [ ] Entry is placed in **alphabetical order** within the correct section
- [ ] Each table column is padded with one space on either side
- [ ] I have **not removed** any existing entries
- [ ] I have searched the list for duplicates (same API name or URL)
- [ ] The API link is working and returns documentation
- [ ] All changes have been [squashed][squash-link] into a single commit

## API Details

**API Name:**
**Category/Section:**
**Why this API is useful:**

[squash-link]: <https://github.com/todotxt/todo.txt-android/wiki/Squash-All-Commits-Related-to-a-Single-Issue-into-a-Single-Commit>
